_note: EXAMPLE FILE — safe to commit. Copy to config/clients/sunset.secrets.json and fill real values. sunset.secrets.json is gitignored. Never put real phone numbers, passwords, or Stripe keys in this file.
_handoff_whatsapp_phone_note: Sunset staff WhatsApp number for handoffs. E.164 format.
_handoff_email_note: Sunset staff email for email-channel handoffs (fast-follow; populate when email ingress is live).
_master_admin_note: Numbers that can manage staff directory and run admin commands via WhatsApp bot.
_staff_admin_password_note: Optional second-factor password for admin operations via WhatsApp.
_stripe_publishable_note: Sunset Stripe publishable key (test key for staging, live key for production).
_stripe_secret_note: Sunset Stripe secret key — used server-side only, never exposed to guests.
_stripe_webhook_note: Sunset Stripe webhook signing secret for payment truth verification.
